description: Catalogue of external Python libraries for building LLM applications. mindX consults this registry when planning capability expansion. Awareness != adoption: each library carries an explicit overlap-with-mindX assessment and a recommendation. Per the Agnostic Modules Principle, mindX does not silently take dependencies on these libraries — entries marked 'investigate' may become improvement-backlog items; entries marked 'skip' overlap with mindX-native systems.

mindx_overlap.partial: mindX has overlapping capability but the library covers ground mindX does not.
mindx_overlap.full: mindX has a native system that fully covers this library's purpose.

adoption_recommendation.adopted: Already a direct or transitive dependency.
adoption_recommendation.adopted_forked: Source code adapted into mindX (license-compliant fork of select files). No runtime dep added. See module README for what was ported.
adoption_recommendation.investigate: Worth a focused evaluation; backlog item likely.
adoption_recommendation.monitor: Watch for upstream changes; revisit later.
adoption_recommendation.skip: Overlaps with mindX-native systems; adopting would invert architecture.

transformers.name: Transformers
transformers.purpose: Hugging Face core library for loading, tokenizing, generating with, and fine-tuning open-source LLMs.
transformers.rationale: Already used in mindx_backend_service/rage/deeprage/ for embedding models. mindX is a downstream consumer of HF artifacts via Ollama/vLLM in production.

langchain.name: LangChain
langchain.purpose: Wires prompts, retrievers, tools, APIs, and model calls into multi-step chains for chatbots, RAG, and agents.
langchain.rationale: mindX has its own BDI/AGInt orchestration substrate. Adopting LangChain would invert the architecture and re-implement what BDI plus the tool registry already provide. Watch for ideas, do not adopt.

llamaindex.name: LlamaIndex
llamaindex.purpose: Connects LLM apps to external data (docs, PDFs, DBs) for RAG-style grounded answers.
llamaindex.rationale: mindX uses RAGE (Retrieval Augmented Generation Engine) backed by pgvector and Ollama embeddings. RAGE is the mindX-native equivalent and the operational standard.

vllm.name: vLLM
vllm.purpose: High-throughput, memory-efficient inference server for open-source LLMs (PagedAttention, continuous batching).
vllm.rationale: mindX has agents/vllm_agent.py as a wrapper, but vLLM itself is not deployed (4GB VPS cannot host it). Tracked in OLLAMA_VLLM_CLOUD_RESEARCH.md for the future GPU server. Already the planned upgrade path beyond Ollama.

unsloth.name: Unsloth
unsloth.purpose: Resource-efficient fine-tuning via LoRA/QLoRA, optimized for low VRAM.
unsloth.rationale: mindX has no fine-tuning pipeline today. Unsloth is the natural choice once GPU budget exists. Pair with Modelfile-as-schema to fold tuned models back into the Ollama pillar.

crewai.name: CrewAI
crewai.purpose: Multi-agent framework for role-based agent teams that collaborate, use tools, and split work.
crewai.rationale: mindX has Mastermind/Coordinator/CEO orchestration plus the Boardroom (8-soldier consensus). The role-based-team pattern is already covered by the boardroom roster (CISO, CFO, CRO, CLO, CPO, CTO, COO, CEO).

autogpt.name: AutoGPT
autogpt.purpose: Early autonomous agent system for goal-driven, multi-step task execution.
autogpt.rationale: Historical reference for the AGInt/BDI lineage. mindX's autonomous loop (mindXagent + 5-min improvement cycle + machine.dreaming) is the contemporary equivalent. Not a candidate for adoption.

langgraph.name: LangGraph
langgraph.purpose: Stateful, branching agent workflows with memory and multi-step control flow.
langgraph.rationale: BDI is the stateful-graph substrate in mindX. Beliefs persist, intentions branch, plans replan. Adopting LangGraph would duplicate the cognitive layer.

deepeval.name: DeepEval
deepeval.purpose: Pytest-style evaluation for LLM apps: relevance, hallucination, faithfulness, task success.
deepeval.rationale: Fork of the GEval algorithm + BaseMetric + LLMTestCase shape lives at agents/eval/ (Apache-2.0, attribution in agents/eval/NOTICE). Phase 1 wired to log_godel_choice() — gated by MINDX_EVAL_GODEL_ENABLED=1. Default judge is CPU-pillar Ollama (qwen3:1.7b), zero new runtime deps. Phases 2 (boardroom soldier confidence) and 3 (reasoning_quality fitness axis) tracked in improvement_backlog.json at priority 6.

openai_python.name: OpenAI Python SDK
openai_python.purpose: Official client for hosted OpenAI models (chat, reasoning, multimodal).
openai_python.rationale: Direct dependency in requirements.txt, wired via llm/llm_factory.py and the OpenAI handler. Also the compatibility surface for Ollama Cloud's /v1/chat/completions route.
